name: fleet-intelligence-ai
description: Fleet Mind AI production-grade SaaS monorepo foundation

scripts.dev:all: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:worker" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.dev:setup: docker compose up -d && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'pnpm --filter @fleetmind/database prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @fleetmind/database prisma:migrate:deploy && pnpm --filter @fleetmind/database prisma:seed'
